Print from home This coupon must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Memorial Hall Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of

coupon.source_phrase_block: Print from home This coupon must be presented to Plimoth Patuxet Museums guest services staff upon arrival at the Museum for Memorial Hall Library patrons to purchase a Heritage Pass, Combination Pass, or Plimoth Patuxet Only pass for up to six individuals at the reduced rate of $16 per adult; $10 per child ages 5-17. This coupon is for one time use only by the patron.
